decks.notes: The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay, using cards like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast to deal damage quickly to the opponent. Key creatures like Mogg Fanatic, Jackal Pup, and Ball Lightning are used to apply pressure and finish off the opponent. Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll provide additional means of dealing direct damage. Mishra's Factory and Goblin Cadets are used for creature support, while Barbarian Ring offers a repeatable source of damage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

The Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on aggressively playing low-cost creatures and disruption spells to quickly deplete the opponent's resources and life total. By using efficient threats like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, along with disruptive spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, the deck aims to control the game and secure victories through consistent damage output. With a strong emphasis on early pressure and disruption, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents before they can establish their game plan, utilizing cards like Mishra's Factory and Cursed Scroll to maintain tempo and push towards victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly cycle through cards and set up a powerful combo with Replenish. By sacrificing enchantments like Parallax Wave and Attunement, players can then use Replenish to return multiple powerful enchantments from the graveyard to the battlefield, overwhelming their opponents. The deck also includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Decree of Silence to help stall and protect the combo. With proper sequencing and card advantage, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on using Stiflenought combo, combining Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle to cheat a massive creature into play. The deck includes various card draw spells and counterspells to control the game until the combo can be assembled. Its strategy is to disrupt the opponent's plays while quickly assembling the combo for a powerful win condition. The inclusion of cards like Gush and Foil also allows for additional card advantage and protection for the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly combo off by utilizing cards like Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor to mill your entire library, then reanimate a powerful creature like Sutured Ghoul or Terravore. This strategy is supported by cards like Hermit Druid and Worldly Tutor to find key pieces of the combo, while also disrupting your opponent's hand with cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress. The deck also includes some protection and versatility with cards like Exhume and Dragon Breath for additional combo potential.

The main concept of this BW Control deck is to establish control over the game by using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and board wipes to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck includes a mix of permanent removal like Vindicate and Gerrard's Verdict, hand disruption with Duress and Cabal Therapy, and board wipes such as Wrath of God and Decree of Justice. The deck also includes card advantage in the form of Skeletal Scrying and Eternal Dragon to ensure a steady stream of resources while controlling the board and eventually overpowering the opponent.

The main concept of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using Goblin creatures. The deck includes powerful Goblin cards such as Goblin Warchief, Goblin Piledriver, and Siege-Gang Commander to quickly build a board presence and deal damage to the opponent. Cards like Goblin Matron and Goblin Ringleader help to search for and draw additional Goblin creatures for added consistency. The inclusion of Gempalm Incinerator and Mogg Fanatic provide additional removal options to control the opponent's board while pushing for victory through aggressive attacks.

This deck aims to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to slow down the opponent's threats. It utilizes the Standstill enchantment to generate card advantage while preventing the opponent from playing more threats. The deck also includes land destruction cards like Dust Bowl and Powder Keg to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The win condition is typically through Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, with backup win conditions like Decree of Justice and attacking with creature lands. The key strategy is to maintain control of the game until the opponent runs out of resources.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble the combo pieces of Opalescence, Serra's Sanctum, and Enchantress effects to generate a large amount of mana and draw cards by casting enchantments. Solitary Confinement can protect the player while setting up the combo. Parallax Wave can also be used to control the board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful enchantments and control the game until it can win with a massive creature or combo finish.

This mono black aggro deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's hand with discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress while putting pressure on the board with efficient creatures like Nantuko Shade and Hypnotic Specter. The deck also includes ways to control the opponent's resources with cards like Wasteland and Cursed Scroll. The overall strategy is to maintain card advantage with cards like Graveborn Muse and Skeletal Scrying while gradually wearing down the opponent's life total with a consistent stream of threats.

The deck focuses on using Attunement and Intuition to quickly fill the graveyard with enchantments, then cast Replenish to bring them back all at once. Parallax Wave and Opalescence form a powerful combo to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. Decree of Silence helps to stall the game and protect the combo, while Seal of Cleansing can deal with problematic enchantments. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of threats and disruption, ultimately leading to a decisive victory.

This deck focuses on chaining together cards to quickly bring out Phyrexian Dreadnought and combining it with Stifle to counter any attempt to remove it. The deck also includes a mix of counterspells and card draw to help control the game and protect the combo. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting opponents' plays, this deck aims to quickly win the game through a powerful combo.

This deck aims to assemble a powerful combo involving cards like Hermit Druid, Karmic Guide, and Phyrexian Devourer to quickly fill the graveyard and take advantage of recursion effects. The deck uses cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition. By efficiently cycling through the deck with cards like Gemstone Mine and Birds of Paradise, the deck is able to consistently find the pieces it needs to execute its combo and win the game.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo involving Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a variety of counter spells and card draw to protect and find the combo pieces efficiently. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up the combo to win the game in a decisive manner. With careful timing and sequencing, the deck aims to control the game and achieve victory through a well-timed and powerful combo.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly get creatures onto the battlefield. The deck also has strong removal options with Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander. Additionally, the inclusion of Goblin King and Goblin Warchief provides powerful tribal synergy, making it difficult for opponents to effectively block or remove the goblin horde. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to hinder the opponent's mana development.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. It utilizes a combination of fast, low-cost creatures, direct damage spells, and repeatable burn effects to keep pressure on the opponent. By constantly attacking and using burn spells efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. It sacrifices card advantage and long-term strategy for a fast and relentless assault on the opponent's life total.
